pr.title: Scaffold and harden AI futures trading bot
pr.body: ## Summary - Add FastAPI backend scaffold with trading engine, risk/safety controls, AI trade filter, CCXT exchange abstraction, strategies, backtesting, database models, and migrations. - Add Docker Compose deployment for API, worker, frontend, PostgreSQL, and Redis. - Harden paper-trading deployment with API key auth, restricted CORS, Redis auth, required DB/Redis secrets, Alembic psycopg driver, non-root containers, readiness checks, worker heartbeat/scanning loop, and persisted paper trades/dashboard data. - Force deployed dashboard API call to `GET http://81.27.108.159:8000/api/v1/dashboard/summary` inside the React dashboard component `useEffect()` on page load. - Ensure the dashboard summary request sends `x-api-key: testkey123`, logs `Fetching dashboard summary...`, logs `Dashboard API response:`, and uses `console.error` on failures. - Replace blank/static card behavior with live API state mapping and exact realistic paper fallback values when backend data is empty/unavailable: balance 10000, daily PnL 127.45, open PnL 42.10, win rate 62%, max drawdown 4.8%, BTC long / ETH short positions, and fake recent trades. - Add visible frontend API error messages and loading states. - Add realistic paper trading simulation with fake execution, simulated balance, long/short positions, leverage-aware margin, live market price marking from exchange OHLCV, simulated stop-loss/take-profit closures, PnL updates, and trade history dashboard integration. - Add structured Telegram alerts for startup/shutdown, simulated trades, errors, warnings, strategy signals, worker loop failures, and fatal worker crashes. - Enforce production paper/sandbox mode by rejecting `LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=true`, `PAPER_TRADING_ENABLED=false`, or `EXCHANGE_SANDBOX=false` at startup. - Merge latest `origin/main`; current conflicts were simple frontend conflicts where `main` had the previous multi-endpoint/env dashboard version and this branch had the latest explicit summary fetch fix. Resolved by keeping this branch's newer summary-fetch implementation. ## Validation - `npm run build` in `frontend` - Merge validation confirmed the dashboard retains: - `const API_BASE_URL = "http://81.27.108.159:8000"` - `const API_KEY = "testkey123"` - `const DASHBOARD_SUMMARY_URL = `${API_BASE_URL}/api/v1/dashboard/summary`` - `Fetching dashboard summary...` - `Dashboard API response:` - `console.error("Dashboard API fetch failed:"...)` - `"x-api-key": API_KEY` - `GET /api/v1/dashboard/summary` - fallback values `balance: 10000` and `dailyPnL: 127.45` - `git diff --check` - Previous validations include backend compile, route protection, paper simulation smoke tests, Telegram alert smoke tests, and production safety checks - `docker compose config` could not be run because Docker is not installed in this environment.
pr.author: detvildevestendk-code
